creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the patch you sumbitted. Being the maintainer of games/flightgear,
I'll take maintainership for this port.

I've modified the patch to stick to the style of other flightgear ports
(e.g. to use COPYTREE_SHARE).

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
http://www.martymac.com
